identity.title: Path A — PlanArtifact operator kickoff
identity.summary: First real PlanArtifact: validate, persist, review, accept, finalize dry-run on this workspace.

goals: Operator can run draft → review → accept → finalize dry-run without hand-editing plan files
Dashboard plan lifecycle panel shows the persisted draft
nonGoals: Shipping new planner features in this plan
whatNotToDo: Do not hand-edit task store for plan status
openQuestions: Which phase key should finalize target after accept — 110 or 111?

wbs.title: Validate and persist PlanArtifact draft
goalMapping: Operator can run draft → review → accept → finalize dry-run without hand-editing plan files

wbs.approach: Use draft-plan-artifact persist:false then persist:true; review-plan-artifact; accept-plan-artifact; finalize-plan-to-phase dryRun:true
acceptanceCriteria: finalize-plan-to-phase dryRun:true returns preview without task writes
testingVerification: Manual CLI smoke on workflow-cannon workspace
wbs.doneMeans: All four lifecycle commands succeed with policyApproval where required
